artifact_plan.depth_signals: Single focused concept (conditional probability) with 2–3 sub-concepts and Real-World Patterns warranted, but no multi-technology pipeline or lab system — standard profile fits cleanly.
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Full sample space vs reduced sample space side-by-side: left panel shows all 6 die outcomes with event A highlighted; right panel shows the reduced space after condition B is applied, with the same event A re-highlighted within the smaller set.
